title: Facade Preservation
description: A reference-dependent series: one precise architectural pencil sketch followed by three photoreal render interpretations that preserve the same building layout.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a hand-drawn facade with strict horizon, massing, floor heights, window rhythm, and entry placement. Images 02-04 depend on that reference and test whether photoreal lighting, weather, and viewpoint changes can keep the sketch structure intact without inventing extra architecture.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Facade Preservation
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one precise architectural pencil sketch followed by three photoreal render interpretations that preserve the same building layout.

zh-CN.title: 立面保真系列
zh-CN.description: 一张精确建筑铅笔草图作为参考,后续三张照片级效果图保持同一建筑布局。
